parameters.query: SELECT st.id, st.site_url, st.country_code, st.proxy_url, st.proxy_type, st.timezone, st.accept_language, st.render_domain, st.block_uuids, st.extra_params, st.geozo_block_id, pc.di_login, pc.di_password, pc.di_host, pc.di_port FROM scan_targets st CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_login' THEN value END) as di_login, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_password' THEN value END) as di_password, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_host' THEN value END) as di_host, MAX(CASE WHEN key='dataimpulse_port' THEN value END) as di_port FROM bot_config WHERE category='proxy') pc WHERE st.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY st.country_code, st.site_url

WITH our_match AS (
  SELECT t.ad_id, (elem->>'position')::int AS pos
  FROM teasers t,
  jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.teasers).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) elem
  WHERE t.ad_id IS NOT NULL
    AND t.ad_id::text = elem->>'media_id'
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT ad_id FROM our_match),
  (SELECT pos FROM our_match),
  {{ $json.teasers_found }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ block_ids: $json.block_ids, teasers: $json.teasers, country_code: $json.country_code }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  0,
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ widget_found: false, block_ids: [], country_code: $json.country_code, error: $json.error || "no widget" }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

parameters.query: SELECT media_id, title, destination_url, cost, last_seen_at, last_rechecked_at, 'competitor' as source FROM competitors WHERE site_url = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' UNION ALL SELECT ad_id as media_id, title, NULL as destination_url, NULL as cost, NULL as last_seen_at, NULL as last_rechecked_at, 'ours' as source FROM teasers WHERE ad_id IS NOT NULL

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S918B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.6261.64 Mobile Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO competitors (
  media_id, site_url, title, image_url, destination_url, position,
  block_id, landing_domain, render_domain, short_description,
  full_description, button_text, geozo_ad_id, geozo_adgroup_id,
  geozo_site_id, country_code, cost, show_rate, avg_position
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.image_url ? "'" + $json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.landing_url && !['resolve_failed','blocked_by_antifraud'].includes($json.landing_url) ? "'" + $json.landing_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.position || 0 }},
  {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.landing_domain ? "'" + $json.landing_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.render_domain ? "'" + $json.render_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.short_description ? "'" + $json.short_description.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.full_description ? "'" + $json.full_description.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.button_text ? "'" + $json.button_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.geozo_ad_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.geozo_adgroup_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.geozo_site_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.show_rate || 0 }},
  {{ $json.position || 0 }}
WHERE '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != '' AND '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != 'undefined'
ON CONFLICT (site_url, title) DO UPDATE SET
  last_seen_at = NOW(),
  times_seen = competitors.times_seen + 1,
  media_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.media_id, competitors.media_id),
  position = EXCLUDED.position,
  image_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.image_url, competitors.image_url),
  destination_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.destination_url, competitors.destination_url),
  block_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.block_id, competitors.block_id),
  landing_domain = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.landing_domain, competitors.landing_domain),
  render_domain = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.render_domain, competitors.render_domain),
  short_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.short_description, competitors.short_description),
  full_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.full_description, competitors.full_description),
  button_text = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.button_text, competitors.button_text),
  geozo_ad_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_ad_id, competitors.geozo_ad_id),
  geozo_adgroup_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_adgroup_id, competitors.geozo_adgroup_id),
  geozo_site_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.geozo_site_id, competitors.geozo_site_id),
  country_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.country_code, competitors.country_code),
  cost = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.cost, competitors.cost),
  show_rate = EXCLUDED.show_rate,
  avg_position = CASE
    WHEN competitors.avg_position IS NULL THEN EXCLUDED.position
    ELSE ROUND((competitors.avg_position * 0.7 + EXCLUDED.position * 0.3)::numeric, 2)
  END,
  position_stability = CASE
    WHEN competitors.avg_position IS NULL THEN 1.0
    ELSE ROUND(GREATEST(0, 1.0 - ABS(EXCLUDED.position - competitors.avg_position) / GREATEST(competitors.avg_position, 1))::numeric, 4)
  END,
  last_rechecked_at = CASE WHEN {{ $json.is_recheck ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }} THEN NOW() ELSE competitors.last_rechecked_at END;

-- Record history (only if title is valid)
INSERT INTO competitor_history (competitor_id, media_id, site_url, position, cost, show_rate)
SELECT id, media_id, site_url, position, cost, show_rate
FROM competitors
WHERE site_url = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND title = '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != '' AND '{{ ($json.title || "") }}' != 'undefined';

-- Auto-cache geozo_block_id to scan_targets if discovered
UPDATE scan_targets SET geozo_block_id = {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }}
WHERE {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 0 }} > 0
  AND site_url = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND (geozo_block_id IS NULL OR geozo_block_id != {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 0 }});
